error.description: Contains an explanation of the status_code as defined in HTTP/1.1 standard (RFC 7231)

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.

detail.description: Contains parameter or domain specific information related to the error and why it occurred.

ref.description: Link to documentation of error type

downstream_errors.description: Contains downstream errors returned from the connector. Only present when type_name is ConnectorExecutionError.

message.description: Error message from the downstream provider

code.description: Error code from the downstream provider

example.message: Account code '100' has been archived or deleted
example.detail: Each line item must reference a valid account
